evals.prompt: I want to send my new protein bar to 30 fitness influencers on Instagram and get Reels back for my ads
evals.expected_output: Product gifting campaign setup with London AI for creator matching, Shopify integration, UGC rights explanation

assertions.name: london_ai
assertions.description: Mentions London AI agent for finding fitness creators or automated matching

assertions.name: product_gifting
assertions.description: Covers Shopify product gifting integration or shipping to creators

assertions.name: ugc_rights
assertions.description: Mentions full content usage rights for repurposing UGC in ads

assertions.name: content_workflow
assertions.description: Describes content approval workflow or reviewing submitted UGC

evals.prompt: How do I connect my Impact affiliate account to Creator.co and track which creators drive sales?
evals.expected_output: Affiliate setup walkthrough with Impact integration, tracking links, and ROAS reporting

assertions.name: impact_integration
assertions.description: Mentions Impact as a supported affiliate network integration

assertions.name: tracking_setup
assertions.description: Covers setting up unique tracking links or coupon codes per creator

assertions.name: attribution
assertions.description: Mentions conversion attribution or linking creator content to sales

assertions.name: reporting
assertions.description: Mentions real-time dashboard, ROAS, or performance analytics

evals.prompt: I have 25 creators who applied to my campaign but I'm not sure how to pick the good ones — some might have fake followers
evals.expected_output: Creator vetting workflow using Deep Insights with fake follower warning

assertions.name: deep_insights
assertions.description: Mentions Deep Insights reports for reviewing creator quality

assertions.name: fake_follower_warning
assertions.description: Warns about fake followers on the marketplace or mentions Creator.co lacks built-in detection

assertions.name: vetting_criteria
assertions.description: Lists specific vetting criteria like engagement rate, audience demographics, or authenticity indicators

assertions.name: cross_reference
assertions.description: Suggests cross-referencing with native analytics or third-party tools
